DRAFT
  • Data Products
  • View page source

Data Products

The products/ directory of the repository contains pre-computed results, including:

  • ILC residual curves for the supported experiment configurations:

    • S4-Wide (Chilean LAT) – PBDR noise specs (Oct 2023).

    • S4-Ultra deep (South Pole LAT) – PBDR noise specs (Oct 2023).

    • S4-Wide (Chilean LAT) – achieved (best possible) performance.

  • Lensing noise curves for the above configurations.

  • Galactic foreground masks (Planck Galactic masks with the CMB-S4 footprint applied).

Use the read_ilc_residuals.py and read_lensing_noise.py scripts to load these products.
